title: Unified Legend When Coloring by Column Name Across Connected Boards in Calendar Widget
excerpt: When using the Calendar widget with multiple connected boards, even after matching columns and selecting “All at once” for Color by and Label by, the legend shows duplicate entries for each board when coloring by column …

posts.author: stephanie.moore (Stephanie Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using the Calendar widget with multiple connected boards, even after matching columns and selecting “All at once” for Color by and Label by, the legend shows duplicate entries for each board when coloring by column name.

Even though the column names and structures are identical, the widget treats them separately, leading to duplicate colors and labels. This creates unnecessary clutter and reduces the usability of the Calendar view for multi-board tracking.

Request:

  • When coloring by column name, the widget should recognize matched columns across boards and unify the legend into a single color and label.
  • Color and label settings should apply consistently across connected boards, rather than treating each board as a separate source.

This enhancement would make the Calendar widget much more functional for teams managing projects across multiple boards.
